title: meibomia terminalis
intro: Meibomia terminalis, also known as Butterfly Weed, is a flowering plant native to North America, belonging to the milkweed family (Apocynaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of cardenolides. The health benefits of Meibomia terminalis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues like coughs and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs in traditional medicine.
